title: lippia villafloridana
intro: Lippia villafloridana, also known as Wild Verbena, is a flowering plant native to Florida, United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lippia villafloridana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antiseptic to heal wounds. Lippia villafloridana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
